name: POCS
description: Projection Onto Convex Sets reconstructs missing traces by iteratively thresholding F-K spectra and re-injecting known samples. A workhorse baseline for randomly missing trace recovery.

name: MSSA
description: Multichannel Singular Spectrum Analysis arranges f-x slices into Hankel matrices and applies rank reduction to attenuate random noise and reconstruct missing traces.

name: Curvelet Denoising
description: Sparsity-promoting denoising in the curvelet domain. Curvelets approximately sparsify wavefronts, so soft-thresholding their coefficients suppresses random noise while preserving steep events.

name: F-K Filter
description: Frequency-wavenumber band-pass mute targeting coherent linear noise (e.g. ground roll). Simple, fast, and the de-facto reference point for any new denoiser.

name: Radon Transform
description: High-resolution parabolic Radon transform reconstructs missing offsets by sparse modeling of move-out trajectories. Robust on regularly-sampled marine gathers.

name: STA/LTA
description: Short-Term Average / Long-Term Average ratio detector. The classical first-break picker — a moving-window energy ratio crossing a threshold.

name: SeisU-Net
description: U-Net adapted for seismic 2D sections with skip connections preserving high-frequency content. Trained jointly for trace interpolation and random-noise attenuation.

name: SeisGAN
description: Conditional GAN for trace interpolation. The discriminator enforces phase-consistent reconstructions, reducing the over-smoothing seen in MSE-trained baselines.

name: DnCNN-Seis
description: Residual CNN trained to predict the noise component of a seismic patch. Originally an image denoiser, retrained on synthetic Marmousi shot gathers with random Gaussian noise.

name: SeisFormer
description: Swin-Transformer backbone with shifted window attention along the trace axis. Captures long-range coherence missed by purely convolutional models.

name: SeisDiff
description: Score-based diffusion prior for seismic denoising. Sampling guided by a measurement-consistency term recovers low-amplitude reflections under heavy noise.

name: PickNet
description: Per-trace 1D CNN classifier predicting a Gaussian likelihood of first-break arrival per sample. Outperforms STA/LTA at low SNR.

name: PhaseNet
description: U-Net trained on three-component waveforms outputting per-sample P/S phase probabilities. Re-purposed here for first-break picking on active-source surveys.

name: Hybrid POCS-Net
description: Unrolled POCS iterations with learned proximal operators. Combines the data-consistency guarantees of model-based methods with the prior of a CNN.

name: SeisBERT
description: Pre-trained masked-trace transformer fine-tuned per task. Demonstrates that a single foundation model transfers across processing tasks with minimal labeled data.
